text: Persepolis is one of the most remarkable ancient sites in the world. It was built during the Achaemenid Empire and served as the ceremonial capital for Nowruz celebrations. Kings from across the empire would travel here to present their tributes.

To cook gheymeh, first finely chop the onions and fry them in oil until golden. Then add the meat and let it brown. Next, add tomato paste, turmeric, and dried lime. Let it simmer on low heat until the meat is perfectly tender.

Earth is the only planet where life has been discovered so far. Its atmosphere is composed of nitrogen and oxygen, and the ozone layer protects us from harmful solar radiation. Liquid water on the surface has created the conditions necessary for life.

Iran is a country with incredible climate diversity. In the north, the green Hyrcanian rainforests are millions of years old. In the south, the warm coasts of the Persian Gulf and the Sea of Oman stretch along the border. The Lut Desert in the east is one of the hottest places on Earth.
